name: Tony Stark
text: Haven of Peace — Forced Response: After you change to this form, remove each nanite counters from Tony Stark. You may shuffle 1 identity-specific card from your discard pile into your deck for each counter removed this way. (to a maximum of 3.) “I love you three thousand” - Morgan Stark

name: Iron Man
text: Nanotechnology — Hero Response: After you play an identity-specific card, place 1 nanite counter on Iron Man. “And I.. Am... Iron Man.”

name: Rescue
text: Response: After you play Rescue from your hand, search your discard pile for an identity-specific event and add it to your hand.

name: F.R.I.D.A.Y.
text: Hero Action: Exhaust F.R.I.D.A.Y. and remove 1 nanite counter from Iron Man → look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 1 to your hand, put 1 on the top of your deck and discard the last one. “The targeting system is broken boss!” —F.R.I.D.A.Y.

name: Tony Stark's villa
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Tony Stark's villa → heal 2 damage from your identity.

name: Mark LXX Armor
text: You get +4 hit points. Hero Action: Exhaust Mark LXX Armor and remove 1 nanite counter from Iron Man → ready your identity.

name: Repulsor Blast
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. This attack gains ranged. If this attack defeats an enemy, you may remove 1 nanite counter from Iron Man → deal 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Micro-Missile Barrage
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. You may remove 2 nanite counters from Iron Man → confuse the villain.

name: Shield Generation
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, remove 1 nanite counter from Iron Man → prevent 3 of that damage and draw 1 card.

name: Arc Reactor
text: Hero Interrupt: When you make a basic attack, exhaust Arc Reactor and remove 1 nanite counter from Iron Man → for this attack, you get +2 ATK and this attack gains piercing and overkill.

name: System Reset
text: Hero Action: Ready Mark LXX Armor, Arc Reactor, F.R.I.D.A.Y. and each Nanite Manipulation you control.

name: Nanite Manipulation
text: Hero Resource: Exhaust Nanite Manipulation → generate a [energy] resource for an identity-specific card. Hero Action: Exhaust Nanite Manipulation → place 1 nanite counter on Iron Man.
